scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,web --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run --filter @orca/backend dev" "pnpm --dir web run dev"
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '*' typecheck && pnpm --dir web run typecheck
scripts.test: vitest run && pnpm --dir web run test
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
